---
title: "pigment-gwas"
subtitle: "A versioned, harmonized compendium of pigmentation GWAS loci"
---

A small atlas of pigmentation GWAS loci (skin, eye, and hair), built to seed improved polygenic scores and
HIrisPlex-style comparisons. Two outputs, produced by two kinds of workbook:

- **[1 · Catalog pull](analysis/01_catalog_pull.qmd)** → `output/catalog/pigmentation_gwas_catalog.csv`
  — the latest NHGRI-EBI GWAS Catalog pull for pigmentation, versioned (every pull archived
  under `output/catalog/versions/`).
- **Per-source workbooks** (e.g. [Crawford 2017](analysis/sources/crawford2017.qmd)) → one
  standardized file each in `output/sources/`.
- **[2 · Combine](analysis/02_combine.qmd)** → `output/pigmentation_gwas_harmonized.csv`
  — the catalog plus every per-source file, unioned and deduplicated onto one shared schema.

**Adding a source** = add one per-source workbook that writes `output/sources/<name>_harmonized.csv`;
the combine step picks it up automatically. See the
[README](https://github.com/lasisilab/pigment-gwas/blob/main/README.md) for the schema and the
add-a-source recipe.
